    ext ε
    simp only [deriv, ContinuousLinearMap.add_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.smul_apply,
      ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.fst_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.snd_apply,
      ContinuousLinearMap.prod_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.pi_apply]

      ContinuousLinearMap.add_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.smul_apply]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [LorentzGroup.1, LorentzGroup.2, Matrix.mul_apply, Fin.sum_univ_succ]) <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try simp_all [LorentzGroup.ext_iff, Matrix.ext_iff]) <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try field_simp) <;>
    (try linarith) <;>
    (try nlinarith)
    <;>
    simp_all [Matrix.dotProduct, Matrix.transpose_apply, Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    simp_all [LorentzGroup.ext_iff, Matrix.ext_iff]
    <;>
    aesop
  exact h_main

have h_main : (deriv (Λ • A)).toFun = (Λ • deriv A).toFun := by
    ext ε
    simp only [deriv, ContinuousLinearMap.smul_def, ContinuousLinearMap.add_def,
      ContinuousLinearMap.toFun, smul_eq_mul]
    <;>
    simp_all [distDeriv_linear_map, CountablyGenerated.linearMap_apply, Pi.smul_apply]
    <;>
    congr 1 <;>
    ext μν <;>
    simp [Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.prod_univ_succ, Fin.prod_univ_zero]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    simp_all [LorentzGroup.smul_def]
    <;>
    simp_all [Finset.sum_mul, Finset.mul_sum, mul_assoc, mul_comm, mul_left_comm]
    <;>
    simp_all [LorentzGroup.smul_def, LinearMap.map_add, LinearMap.map_smul]
    <;>
    simp_all [Finset.sum_mul, Finset.mul_sum, mul_assoc, mul_comm, mul_left_comm]
  
  have h_final : deriv (Λ • A) = Λ • deriv A := by
    apply ContinuousLinearMap.ext
    intro ε
    have h₁ : (deriv (Λ • A)).toFun ε = (Λ • deriv A).toFun ε := by
      rw [h_main]
    have h₂ : (deriv (Λ • A)) ε = (Λ • deriv A) ε := by
      simpa [ContinuousLinearMap.toFun_eq_apply] using h₁
    simpa [ContinuousLinearMap.toFun_eq_apply] using h₂
  
  exact h_final

have h_main : deriv (Λ • A) = Λ • deriv A := by
    ext ε
    simp [deriv, Pi.tsum_apply, add_smul, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
    <;>
    simp_all [ContinuousLinearMap.map_add, ContinuousLinearMap.map_smul, Pi.add_apply, Pi.smul_apply,
      ContinuousLinearMap.map_add, ContinuousLinearMap.map_smul]
    <;>
    congr 1
    <;>
    simp_all [ContinuousLinearMap.map_add, ContinuousLinearMap.map_smul, Pi.add_apply, Pi.smul_apply]
    <;>
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    <;>
    intros <;>
    simp_all [ContinuousLinearMap.map_add, ContinuousLinearMap.map_smul, Pi.add_apply, Pi.smul_apply,
      ContinuousLinearMap.map_add, ContinuousLinearMap.map_smul]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    simp_all [ContinuousLinearMap.map_add, ContinuousLinearMap.map_smul, Pi.add_apply, Pi.smul_apply]
  exact h_main

ext ε
  rw [deriv, deriv]
  simp only [LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk', map_smul]
  have h1 : ∀ [Fintype ι] (s : Finset ι) (f : ι → F) (a : 𝕜),
    (∑ i ∈ s, a • f i) = a • ∑ i ∈ s, f i := by
    intro ι s f a
    rw [Finset.smul_sum]
  have h2 : ∀ (s : Finset ι) (f g : ι → F),
    (∑ i ∈ s, f i + g i) = ∑ i ∈ s, f i + ∑ i ∈ s, g i := by
    intro s f g
    rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  simp_all [HSMul.hSMul]
  <;> simp_all [Finset.sum_smul]
  <;> congr
  <;> ext
  <;> simp_all [distDeriv_smul]
  <;> ring_nf
  <;> simp_all [distDeriv_smul]
  <;> rfl

ext ε
  simp [deriv, smul_smul]
  <;>
  congr <;> ext <;> simp [smul_smul]
  <;>
  ring_nf
  <;>
  simp_all [LorentzGroup.smul]
  <;>
  rfl

ext ε
  simp only [deriv, LinearMap.coe_mk, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk, ToFunFunLike]
  simp [LinearMap.map_smul, smul_assoc]
  <;>
  congr 1 <;>
  ext b <;>
  simp [distDeriv_smul, smul_smul, Finset.mul_sum, Finset.sum_smul]
  <;>
  try ring_nf
  <;>
  try simp_all [LorentzGroup.smul_smul]
  <;>
  try norm_num
  <;>
  try linarith

ext ε
  -- Simplify the expression using the definition of `deriv` and linear operations.
  simp only [LorentzGroup师.actsOn, distDeriv_val, LinearMap.smul_apply]
  -- Use the property of the Lorentz group acting on the derivative.
  <;> congr 1 <;>
    funext x <;>
    simp_all [LorentzGroup.action_ofVecMul, LorentzGroup.action_ofMul, Matrix.dotProduct,
      Finset.mul_sum, Finset.sum_mul, mul_assoc]
  <;>
  rfl

have h1 : deriv (Λ • A) = deriv (fun x => Λ • A x) := rfl
  have h2 : deriv (fun x => Λ • A x) = Λ • deriv A := by
    -- Use the fact that the derivative commutes with the action of Λ
    -- This is a simplification; in reality, we would need to expand the definitions
    -- and show that the derivative of Λ • A is Λ • derivative of A
    -- For simplicity, we assume this is true based on linearity and properties of Λ
    ext ε
    simp [deriv, distDeriv, smul_smul]
    <;>
    congr 1 <;>
    ext <;>
    simp [LorentzGroup.injective, mul_assoc]
    <;>
    congr 1 <;>
    ext <;>
    simp [LorentzGroup.injective, mul_assoc]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    simp_all [mul_assoc]
  calc
    deriv (Λ • A) = deriv (fun x => Λ • A x) := by rw [h1]
    _ = Λ • deriv A := by rw [h2]
